items.title: Kobe Sanders, Clippers Agree To Four-Year, $11.2M Deal https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/286442/Kobe-Sanders-Clippers-Agree-To-Four-Year-$112M-Deal
items.author: RealGM
items.body_excerpt: Kobe Sanders, Clippers Agree To Four-Year, $11.2M Deal https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/286442/Kobe-Sanders-Clippers-Agree-To-Four-Year-$112M-Deal

items.title: Free agent forward Kobe Sanders has agreed to a four-year, $11.2 million deal to return to the Los Angeles Clippers, sources tell ESPN. A second round pick in 2025, Sanders averaged 7.3 points and 19.9 minutes over 68 games as a rookie.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Free agent forward Kobe Sanders has agreed to a four-year, $11.2 million deal to return to the Los Angeles Clippers, sources tell ESPN. A second round pick in 2025, Sanders averaged 7.3 points and 19.9 minutes over 68 games as a rookie.

items.title: Update: The Los Angeles Clippers hope to come to multi-year agreements with Jordan Miller and Kobe Sanders after offering both players qualifying offers, league sources said. bsky.app/profile/mike...
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Update: The Los Angeles Clippers hope to come to multi-year agreements with Jordan Miller and Kobe Sanders after offering both players qualifying offers, league sources said. bsky.app/profile/mike...

items.title: The Los Angeles Clippers have declined team options on Jordan Miller and Kobe Sanders for the 2026-27 season, league sources told HoopsHype. Instead, the Clippers have extended Miller and Sanders qualifying offers heading into free agency. bsky.app/profile/mike...
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Los Angeles Clippers have declined team options on Jordan Miller and Kobe Sanders for the 2026-27 season, league sources told HoopsHype. Instead, the Clippers have extended Miller and Sanders qualifying offers heading into free agency. bsky.app/profile/mike...

items.title: The LA Clippers have extended qualifying offers to Bennedict Mathurin, Jordan Miller, and Kobe Sanders
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
The LA Clippers have extended qualifying offers to Bennedict Mathurin, Jordan Miller, and Kobe Sanders

They will all be restricted free agents

More to come over next few hours

items.title: Asked Trent Redden what the Clippers have learned from picking in the second round so much lately: “I think you look about human characteristics a lot. When we’ve had success with guys, it’s guys we bet on as a human.” Redden mentioned Terance Mann, Amir Coffey, and Kobe Sanders.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Asked Trent Redden what the Clippers have learned from picking in the second round so much lately: “I think you look about human characteristics a lot. When we’ve had success with guys, it’s guys we bet on as a human.” Redden mentioned Terance Mann, Amir Coffey, and Kobe Sanders.
